Video.summary: Josh relives his most harrowing moments hunting the world’s most dangerous storms.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases
Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases
Mission: Hurricane | Top 10 Most Dangerous Chases

Video.summary: In 2014, Josh went face to face with one of the most violent hurricanes ever to strike Cabo San Lucas.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Odile

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Odile
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Odile
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Odile

Video.summary: One hurricane, 2 countries, 2,000 miles. Josh chases Hurricane Fiona from the Dominican Republic to Canada.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Fiona

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Fiona
Mission: Hurricane | Fiona
Mission: Hurricane | Fiona

Video.summary: In 2015, Josh Morgerman traveled to Mexico to chase what would become one of the strongest tropical hurricanes ever recorded. His harrowing experience with Patricia would forever shape his identity as a Hurricane Chaser.
Video.title: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Patricia

Image.alt: Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Patricia
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Patricia
Mission: Hurricane | Hurricane Patricia

Video.summary: We always take weather for granted, but when Mother Nature turns up the heat, she forces us to pay attention.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire
Extreme Weather Countdown | Earth, Wind, and Wildfire

Video.summary: Stop me if you heard this one before? What's fast, windy, and can ruin your day in seconds? Of course, we're talking about the weather. And over the next half hour, we'll be bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera; from hailstorms to tornados and everything in between, we're going to show it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds
Extreme Weather Countdown | Come Hell or High Winds

Video.summary: Buckle up, folks, because we're headed straight into the eye of the hurricane, the mouth of the volcano, and the depths of the flood, and we're doing it all right here, on another episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head
Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head
Extreme Weather Countdown | Raindrops Keep Falling On My Head

Video.summary: Today's forecast is a doozy! Wind, followed by hail, and then with a bit of a hurricane for good measure.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow
Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow
Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow

Video.summary: The wind whips and rain is pours, but you're not in the elements- you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Right As Rainstorms

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Right As Rainstorms
Extreme Weather Countdown | Right As Rainstorms
Extreme Weather Countdown | Right As Rainstorms

Video.summary: Weather has always been here, from long before arrived, and it will stick around long after we are gone. This unstoppable force has both enhanced and ruined people's days since the dawn of time...but it also creates some incredible situations. Lucky for you, we've captured some of the best for you to see. Strap in and prepare yourself, because it's time once again for Extreme Weather Countdown.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Flashflood Gates Are Open!

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Flashflood Gates Are Open!
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Flashflood Gates Are Open!
Extreme Weather Countdown | The Flashflood Gates Are Open!

Video.summary: Here at Extreme Weather Countdown, no natural phenomenon is too crazy, and we've returned with an episode chock-full of footage from the eye of the storm. Settle in, because there are rough seas ahead.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain Check

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain Check
Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain Check
Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain Check

Video.summary: Today's countdown will give you a front row seat to weather phenomena from around the globe!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Whichever Way the Wind Blows

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Whichever Way the Wind Blows
Extreme Weather Countdown | Whichever Way the Wind Blows
Extreme Weather Countdown | Whichever Way the Wind Blows

Video.summary: In these viral videos we witness how, in the blink of an eye, your day can become suddenly dangerous. Even on a beautiful day, when you're not expecting any severe weather at all, Mother Nature can sometimes be malicious and sneaky
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Sudden Danger

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Sudden Danger
Captured: Extreme Weather | Sudden Danger
Captured: Extreme Weather | Sudden Danger

Video.summary: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard
Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard
Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard

Video.summary: In this episode we show some of the most extreme winter weather ever caught on camera.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Extreme Winters

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Extreme Winters
Captured: Extreme Weather | Extreme Winters
Captured: Extreme Weather | Extreme Winters

Video.summary: Mother Nature unleashes some of her most deadly forces to wreak havoc in the air and unexpectedly terrify her victims.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Dangerous Skies

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Dangerous Skies
Captured: Extreme Weather | Dangerous Skies
Captured: Extreme Weather | Dangerous Skies

Video.summary: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Vicious Winds

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Vicious Winds
Captured: Extreme Weather | Vicious Winds
Captured: Extreme Weather | Vicious Winds

Video.summary: El Nińo is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Nińo occurs.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Video.summary: It's man versus nature in a race against time. Heart-pounding rescues captured on camera in these viral weather videos.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Rescues

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Rescues
Captured: Extreme Weather | Rescues
Captured: Extreme Weather | Rescues

Video.summary: A narrow escape from a raging wildfire – a dramatic encounter with a mudslide - the jaw-dropping images of a flash flood – just some of the encounters with two of nature’s most destructive forces caught on camera in this Fire and Water episode.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Fire & Water

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Fire & Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Fire & Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Fire & Water

Video.summary: El Nińo is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Nińo occurs.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Video.summary: Tornadoes; they are the embodiment of severe weather. In this episode we show some of the most terrifying weather caught on camera; from surviving a direct hit to a tornado in a typhoon.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Tornadoes

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Tornadoes
Captured: Extreme Weather | Tornadoes
Captured: Extreme Weather | Tornadoes

Video.summary: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
